head: 0b8d788419d038ad9a49343e88f957c980430086
root_cause: Artist Profile migration 20260713150000 was not applied. Extended artists columns and all artist_* profile tables are missing.

production_admin_api_before_fix.shell: HTTP 500 Failed to load artist profile.

notes: Read-only probe only. No schema writes were performed during snapshot capture.
Apply supabase/migrations/20260713150000_artist_profile_infrastructure.sql via scripts/apply-artist-profile-migration.mjs when DATABASE_URL or SUPABASE_ACCESS_TOKEN is available.
Code hardening in lib/artistCatalog.ts allows degraded 200 responses using baseline artists + songs/albums even before migration.
